summary: TAP' Q1 2026 earnings and sales beat forecasts as pricing and mix offset volume declines and fuel Horizon 2030 moves.

headline: Tyson Foods Readies for Q2 Earnings: Key Insights for Investors
summary: Tyson Foods heads into its May 4 Q2 report with revenues seen up 5.6% to $13.8B, but the 76-cent EPS estimate signals a 17.4% drop.

headline: Is Tyson Foods (TSN) Pricing Look Compelling After DOJ Investigation And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are trying to work out whether Tyson Foods at around US$64 per share offers fair value or a potential mispricing, the starting point is understanding how different valuation methods line up. The stock has returned 10.4% year to date and 9.4% over the last year, although the past week shows a 1.8% decline and the 5 year return sits at a 4.8% decline. Recent headlines have focused on Tyson Foods within wider discussions about the US food and protein industry, including commentary on...

headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From Tyson Foods Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
summary: Tyson Foods (NYSE: TSN) will release Q2 earnings on May 4. Analysts expect 78 cents/share, down from 92 cents/share last yr. Company has 3.18% annual dividend yield.
